heading: Cross references
label: 6515 Cross references
notes: Amendments2015—Par. (6). struck out par. (6) which read as follows: “Refunds or credits attributable to partnership items, see section 6227 and subsections (c) and (d) of section 6230.”Pub. L. 114–741990— struck out par. (2) and redesignated the succeeding pars. accordingly, which was executed with respect to the succeeding pars. (consisting of pars. (3) to (7)) by redesignating such pars. as (2) to (6), respectively. Prior to amendment, par. (2) provided a cross reference to section 1481 for overpayment in certain renegotiations of war contracts.Pub. L. 101–5081982—Par. (7). added par. (7).Pub. L. 97–2481978—Par. (6). inserted “regulated investment company or” before “real estate investment trust” and substituted “section 860” for “section 859”. Notwithstanding the directory language that the amendment be made to par. (5), the amendment was executed to par. (6) to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 95–6001976—Par. (1). , (b)(37)(E), redesignated par. (3) as (1). Former par. (1), which referred to section 1321 for adjustments incident to involuntary liquidation of inventory, was struck out.Pub. L. 94–455, § 1901(b)(36)(D)Par. (2). , redesignated par. (4) as (2). Former par. (2), which referred to section 1335 for war loss recoveries where the prior benefit rule was elected, was struck out.Pub. L. 94–455, § 1901(b)(37)(E)Pars. (3) to (7). , redesignated pars. (3) to (7) as (1) to (5), respectively.Pub. L. 94–455, § 1901(b)(37)(E)Par. (8). , added par. (8) which was redesignated par. (6) by .Pub. L. 94–455, § 1601(f)(3)section 1901(b)(37)(E) of Pub. children.text: Deficiency dividends of a personal holding company, see section 547.
Service in a combat zone, etc., see section 7508.
Suits for refund by taxpayers, see section 6532(a).
Deficiency dividends of a regulated investment company or real estate investment trust, see section 860.
